CPS Labor Market: Statistical Significance

Changes in unemployment indicators with 90% confidence intervals

Published

May 11, 2026

The shaded band around zero shows the range of changes that are not statistically significant at the 90% level. When the line falls outside the shaded band, the change is statistically significant. A break in the line indicates missing data (October 2025).
